CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2015 Continued To Jun-02-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement And/Or Enter Judgment Under Ccp Sec 664.6 And Request For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jan-07-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KEVIN O'CONNOR'S Motion To Enforce Settlement And/Or Enter Judgment Under CCP Sec 664.6 And Request For Attorneys Fees is denied without prejudice. If moving party files a new motion, it should provide sufficient evidence that Plaintiff is in breach of the settlement agreement. The moving papers did not provide evidence of tax liability. Alleged late payments need to be identified with specificity and supported with admissible evidence. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement And/Or Enter Judgment Under Ccp Sec 664.6 And Request For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Continued To Jan-07-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Atty. DAVID B. TILLOTSON of Flynn Riley Bailey & Pasek, LLP, Tel No. (415) 461-1000 for the Plaintiff by telephone appearance;
Atty. RAVI D. SAHAE of Flynn Riley Bailey & Pasek, LLP, Tel No. (415) 461-1000 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Matt Wertheim, Tel No. (415) 775-8950 appearing for the Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D - DEFENDANT KEVIN O'CONNOR'S Motion To Enforce Settlement And/Or Enter Judgment Under CCP Sec 664.6 And Request For Attorneys Fees is continued to January 7, 2015. Court instructed defense counsel to prepare a proposed order citing admissible evidence in detail re: the basis of his claim, and what supports it, as if the proposed order were a brief. Defense counsel shall submit this proposed order within one week. No appearances necessary if the court signs an order prior to January 7, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn 1) To Compel Responses To Pltf'S Discovery Req.'S 2) For Req.'S For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted And 3) For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Text Ruling
